purpose: Public header for PluginWindow — a JUCE DocumentWindow that hosts a plugin's editor (native, generic, programs, or parameters view) with per-plugin persistent position via owner->properties.
invariants: WindowFormatType enum order is load-bearing: Normal=0 (preferred), then Generic/Programs/Parameters; NumTypes is the count sentinel.
getDesktopScaleFactor() is hard-overridden to 1.0f to prevent JUCE from double-scaling plugin editors on high-DPI displays.
gotchas: Property keys (uiLastX_/uiLastY_/uiopen_) are stringified per WindowFormatType — changing toString() output silently invalidates persisted plugin window positions for all users.
